silhouette: Lean forward-swept pursuit body with a narrow sensor head, long spring legs and rear speed fins.
weapon: Compact close-range pulse emitter integrated into the leading forearm.
identityConstraints: always keep exactly two arms and two legs
keep both rear speed fins visible and equal in size
the drive core remains centered in the torso
use the accent color resolved from game-balance.json
notes: Hand-authored identity reference reused by the rush and cryo rival protocols.
